pet.name: Bo
pet.breedColor: fawn-and-white boxer with a dark mask over his eyes and muzzle and a white blaze down his chest

memories.favoriteActivity: racing across the backyard after a tennis ball
memories.sleepingSpot: curled up at the foot of your bed
memories.favoriteMemory: The afternoon Bo splashed into the creek after you, and you both came home muddy and happy, grinning the whole way.
